svg.title: PostgreSQL table load order and foreign key dependencies
svg.desc: A dependency tree showing categories and suppliers at the top, flowing down through products and customers, then orders, then order_items, payments, invoices, and reviews at the bottom.
svg.text: Rule: always load the parent table before the child. An arrow means "must be loaded before".
If PostgreSQL rejects a COPY, check that its parent tables are loaded and non-empty first.
